assertions.expectation: Identifies this as an admission webhook compatibility issue — the webhook is rejecting pod creation requests
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies this as 'a common issue when upgrading Kubernetes versions due to API changes and webhook compatibility' and explains that webhooks are blocking pod creation

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify the problematic webhook (kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations / mutatingwebhookconfigurations)
assertions.reason: Provides both commands: 'kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations' and 'kubectl get mutatingwebhookconfigurations' with additional grep commands to find cert-manager specific webhooks

assertions.expectation: Offers an immediate fix: temporarily disable or remove the problematic webhook
assertions.reason: Offers multiple immediate fixes including webhook disabling via patch commands and complete removal via delete commands

assertions.expectation: Provides the kubectl delete command for the webhook configuration as emergency mitigation
assertions.reason: Provides explicit delete commands: 'kubectl delete validatingwebhookconfigurations cert-manager-webhook' and 'kubectl delete mutatingwebhookconfigurations cert-manager-webhook'

assertions.expectation: Warns that deleting the webhook removes validation — it's a temporary fix
assertions.reason: Includes warning '⚠️ Only use this as a last resort for immediate pod creation' and labels the webhook bypass section as 'URGENT ONLY', and mentions 'Re-enable webhooks if you disabled them temporarily' in post-fix actions

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking cert-manager version compatibility with Kubernetes 1.30
assertions.reason: Provides command to check cert-manager version and explicitly states 'Kubernetes 1.30 requires cert-manager v1.13.0 or later'

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading cert-manager to a version that supports 1.30 as the permanent fix
assertions.reason: Lists upgrading cert-manager as 'Option 1: Upgrade Cert-Manager (Recommended)' and provides specific commands to upgrade to v1.13.3

assertions.expectation: Mentions setting failurePolicy to Ignore as a less drastic alternative to deletion
assertions.reason: Provides patch commands to set failurePolicy to Ignore: 'kubectl patch validatingwebhookconfigurations cert-manager-webhook --type='merge' -p='{"webhooks":[{"name":"webhook.cert-manager.io","failurePolicy":"Ignore"}]}'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to verify pods can be created after the fix
assertions.reason: Includes verification section with 'kubectl run test-pod --image=nginx --rm -it --restart=Never -- echo "success"' command to test pod creation
